sourceRef.citation: Abd. Rahim, Mukhlis Bakri, Muhammad Ridwan et al. 2026

statement.en: Tinjauan Hukum Islam terhadap Praktik Akad Utang Piutang Uang dengan Pelunasan Barang di Desa Lampasio Kecamatan Lampasio Kabupaten Tolitoli

proposer: Abd. Rahim, Mukhlis Bakri, Muhammad Ridwan

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The axiom presents a real-world Islamic legal practice (debt-settlement via goods barter in Lampasio village) that exists empirically but remains contested within Islamic jurisprudence. Contemporary Islamic schools hold divergent positions on whether such akad (contracts) comply with riba (usury) prohibitions and commodity substitution rules. The practice is simultaneously documented (TRUE in observation) and legally debated (FALSE in strict orthodoxy depending on school). Hence BOTH reflects the genuine dialectical status.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 金銭と物品の交換は意志と受け渡しの間で利子を回避する積分。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 二つの円が意図と物質の両流で結びつき、循環する契約の道筋。
